channel.name: sales_data
channel.header: Discussing sales data, including delivery times

post.message: Team, I've finished analyzing our delivery performance for 2025. From purchase confirmation to actual delivery, we averaged around 12 weeks. This is a solid timeframe given the industry standards and our production capacity. Let's keep up the good work and aim to maintain or even improve this in 2026.
Hey team, there's a new regulation update regarding EV battery disposal. Let's meet tomorrow at 2pm to discuss the impact on Elexion's operations.
Just a heads up, we've received a few customer complaints about the Elexion app's interface. I think we should look into it and coordinate with the tech team for improvements.
Thanks for the heads up, Rachel. I've booked the conference room for our meeting tomorrow. Let's ensure we're fully compliant with these new regulations.
John, could you share the specific complaints about the app? It might be useful for the upcoming quarterly review.
Sure, Rachel. I'll compile the feedback and email it to you by end of the day.
